channel.title: Galaxy of the Day
channel.description: RSS feed of the galaxy of the day.

item.title: Iron Galaxy
item.description: Iron Galaxy Studios, LLC is an American video game developer studio based in Chicago, Illinois, with additional studios in Orlando, Florida, and Nashville, Tennessee. Iron Galaxy often collaborates with publishers and developers to provide "technical consulting", port games to different platforms, co-development, lead development, and support. Iron Galaxy is most known for its lead development of Rumbleverse and Killer Instinct reboot Seasons 2 & 3, as well as its port work for PC and console games.
